message: Jake
Meryl
Patricia
Gloria
Fabar
Kristy
Nice to meet you, San.
Who were you again?
I'm Snipes.
I haven't heard of you. A film staff?
No, I'm a friend of Guy.
I'm an outsider when it comes to movies.
Oh, is that so.
What do you need?
To see
To talk
To listen
To end the conversation

The movie

About
The serial murder case
Save
I'm closing the game.
In front of such a great actress, the director's proud hall becomes just a backdrop.
I started to lose track of whether this was a dream or reality.
She gazes at me with piercing sharp eyes.
The glow emanating from her might come from the confidence of being a great actress.
She has a strong presence. I thought to myself, this is what a creature looks like when a Hollywood actress is recognized and active.
Hey, so you're the detective?
Yes.
You don't look like one, though. You seem like some rich kid.
Is that so?
It’s not something to be shy about, right?
Is being a detective interesting?
Hmm.
Well, I wonder.
Don't you like your job?
No, I can't really say yet.
Phew.
Hmm, I see.
I may be close to being a proper actress now, but I struggled when I was young.
You say you’re close to being a proper actress, but you’re already an impressive actress known for your acting skills.
Oh, that's nice to hear, even if it's flattery. Thank you.
To speak of struggles, I must be getting old.
By the way, I heard your autobiography is a bestseller. Congratulations!
Thank you very much. But it feels kind of ticklish.
It's truly wonderful that you’re thriving as both an actress and a writer. Will you continue to write?
Oh, please don't flatter me. That was neither talent nor anything. It just caught the eye of gossip-loving people.
That will probably be the first and last time I write anything.
This party seems kind of boring.
Parties are usually like this. But this time, the attendees aren't very exciting.
The atmosphere is bad.
It's a dream-like party for someone like me.
That's great. Go have fun.
Until now, I used to help set up the parties.
You weren’t helped this time?
No.
I was a bit busy.
I think it would have been a bit better if I had helped.
You really don't care about movies, do you?
Do you understand?
That's ridiculous.
You really say it plainly, huh? But I actually prefer people with that kind of personality.
You know, I actually didn’t want to be in this movie. Suddenly playing the role of a mother with a 15-year-old daughter, it's quite rude.
That kind of role seems a bit too early for you.
You're the only one who says that. I might just end up only getting roles as a parent from now on.
I'll give my all to the roles I'm given, but still...
I don't know anyone by that name.
It's a girl who's helping me.
Oh, so she's the girl who was acting like she was in sales earlier.
Ah, I'm sorry.
It's brave of her to handle those kinds of situations.
Since she's your assistant, I think you should train her properly.
Huh?
She's the only daughter. Wouldn't it be better to ask him or her directly?
That's true, but...
Are you investigating each attendee for today's party?
No, that's not it.
If that's the case, you should probably stop doing that.
I'll tell you one thing: that girl grew up among adults, so she talks a lot, but she's actually a very innocent girl.
Seems like it.
Not just 'seems like it'; I'm telling you, don't lead her on too much.
Even if you don't have those feelings, you can't know how she feels, right? You should be careful.
Tony Ford is a stage actor and director. I think he's been blessed with good plays.
He's the one who won the Tony Award, after all.
Oh, we can't tell if that’s purely due to his talent. You shouldn't take it at face value.
Is that how it works?
That's how it is.
Tony is famous for having bad luck with women. You also better watch out so you don't lose your boyfriend.
Fortunately, there aren't any women like that around.
Oh, really? Well, how should I put it?
That's too bad.
Too bad, huh?
Sorry if that was a weird way to say it.
I don't think Tony is a bad guy, though.
If I had to say, he feels like a small-time crook.
That rude woman, didn't she do something to you too?
Haha.
I'm being glared at a bit.
Of course. That woman sees all men as foes. She doesn't realize that's not helping Cindy.
With an agent like that, Cindy doesn’t have much of a future.
Ah, does that girl plan to become an actress?
It seems like those around her think so.
Just because she's popular doesn't mean it's that easy.
Poor girl.
That girl plays my daughter. Can you believe I'm already being cast as a mother to someone that age?
You don't need to worry.
You're still plenty young.
Of course.
That's rude, though.
I never walked around flattering people like that. If you have talent, you don't need to resort to that.
She's a good junior. She's promising for the future.
You don't see her as a rival?
Rival? That girl? Hehe, she's still just starting out.
I'm looking forward to what she does next.
Speaking of murder cases, Jennifer has committed an attempt, you know.
Is that true about attempted murder?
It could have been an accident, or she might have had the intent, only she knows the truth.
I hate to say it, but she might actually be a murderer.
Martin-
45 years old, a film director known as a master in Hollywood.
The director is 45?
That's right. Up until now,
I've worked hand in hand with him.
I think he’s an excellent director. However, he gets all stressed out and has a terrible temper once shooting begins.
I've heard the rumors. But isn’t that just how it goes?
Artists are difficult, you know. Sometimes they make me so angry I don’t want to see them again.
He’s tense right now, so let’s just leave him be.
He’s just a baseball player, right? This time it's just about this relationship, so he's pretending to be an actor.
I don’t think he intends to become an actor.
Is that so? I heard him mumble about turning into an actor despite lacking any acting skills.
I'm not fond of rough guys like him.
Is Guy a rough man? I've known him for a long time, but that's the first time I've heard that assessment.
You wouldn't notice among men.
He’s suited for playing with balls.
She’s supposedly Guy's fiancée, right? Is she actually the eldest daughter of the Dern family?
That’s indeed the case. What of it?
The Dern Family isn't that complicated, you know. So, I kind of feel curious about it.
She lives away from home, and it seems like she hates being asked all sorts of things about her family.
It's fine; I'm interested, but I won't go out of my way to ask.
But, Guy and her really don't seem like a good match, do they? You don't think so either?
I believe love isn't a matter for outsiders to meddle in, but if I had to say, they do seem like a good couple.
Oh, is that so?
Phew.
Hmm.
She kinda looks more like a good match for you, you know.
What’s that? Please stop with the talks that make me feel bad.
A conversation that makes you feel bad.
Yeah, that's not really a topic for a party, is it?
You really lack delicacy, don’t you?
I'm not interested anyway.
※※※ It's a bug ※※※
